name: Spinach Pecan Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup shredded Cheddar or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the quiche shell and bake at 450°F (232°C) for 5 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients: melted butter, cooked bacon crumbles, beaten eggs, salt, nutmeg, chopped onion, pecans, shredded cheese, half and half, and pepper.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared quiche shell.
4. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 30 minutes until a knife inserted off-center comes out clean.
5. Continue baking for an additional 5 to 10 minutes or until set.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
(Makes One 9-Inch Pie)
